title: Brenda IDA contact + OSU/Renaissance essay todos — Dec 12 2020
html:
TL;DR

  • Apple Note from Dec 12, 2020 (Yahir age 17, HS senior year, six weeks before the Jan 14 Meditate todo dump). Four lines: "-Brenda contact for IDA / -OSU COVID essay, wrap up and send / -Renaissance essays… / Jann @10 tommorro".
  • Live snapshot of Yahir's HS-senior college-funding stack assembling in real time: Brenda Aguilera (the IDA contact, i.e. the matched savings program administrator), the OSU application's COVID-essay, the Renaissance essays, and a 10am Jann meeting on the 13th.
  • This is the earliest dated note linking IDA to a named human contact (Brenda) — densifies the ida individual development account concept page from "abstract program" to "Brenda is the human." Also pairs with the later FAFSA help thread to map the full who-helped-Yahir-pay-for-college network.
  • The "OSU COVID essay" reveals that Yahir's actual application essay was on the pandemic — useful biographical fact, no surfaced draft yet. Worth grepping later 2020 / early 2021 for the essay text.
  • Trailing typo "tommorro" and the open-ended "…" on the Renaissance essays both suggest this was a bedtime-typed note — same form as 2021 01 14 meditate, the same compressed one-line-per-todo shape that becomes Yahir's default through 2021.

Key fragments

"-Brenda contact for IDA / -OSU COVID essay, wrap up and send / -Renaissance essays… / Jann @10 tommorro"

Why it matters in the graph

  • First explicit Brenda → IDA binding in the corpus; densifies brenda aguilera beyond a name-only stub.
  • Anchors the Dec 2020 application-cycle micro-cluster alongside FAFSA help and the eventual June 2021 fafsa/Jann/Renaissance follow-up.
  • Confirms COVID-era essay as the OSU application hook — informs how Yahir framed himself to the school he ended up attending.

Privacy

  • Brenda Aguilera and Jann are already entitied (program/scholarship administrators). No new PII surfaced.

Wikilinks

brenda aguilera · ida individual development account · matched savings · osu · renaissance scholarship · jann · covid pandemic era · 2021 01 14 meditate

related.label: Jann questions — FAFSA, OSU refund, JCEF — Oct 12 2021
